[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100110101 6
1 1111100111 8
2 1110111110 8
3 1110111110 8
4 1110111111 9
5 1101011110 7
6 1110110111 8
7 1111001101 7

70 07 1010111110 7
